headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 2, 2026**
article:
The Detroit Tigers secured a 5-2 victory over the Atlanta Braves, with Drew Anderson earning the win. Framber Valdez led the Tigers' pitching effort with 6.0 innings pitched, 8 strikeouts, and 2 earned runs. The Houston Astros bounced back from a blowout loss to the Orioles with an 11-5 win, thanks to Lance McCullers Jr.'s 6.0 innings pitched and 9 strikeouts.

Several players have been placed on the injured list, affecting their teams' lineups. Matt Brash, a right-handed pitcher for the Seattle Mariners, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right lat inflammation. Ryan Helsley, a right-handed pitcher for the Baltimore Orioles, has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation. Other players on the injured list include Brandon Woodruff (Milwaukee Brewers), Kyle Backhus (Philadelphia Phillies), Luis Robert Jr. (New York Mets), Brandon Williamson (Cincinnati Reds), Javier Báez (Detroit Tigers), and Casey Mize (Detroit Tigers).

Several trades and roster movements have taken place. The Detroit Tigers acquired Zack Short from the Washington Nationals for cash. The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash. The Toronto Blue Jays acquired Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for Ty Cummings.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Braves 5-2**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers secured a 5-2 victory over the Atlanta Braves, with Drew Anderson earning the win. Framber Valdez led the Tigers' pitching effort with 6.0 innings pitched, 8 strikeouts, and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Astros Fall to Orioles in Blowout**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles dominated the Houston Astros 10-3, handing them a tough loss. Jeremiah Jackson led the Orioles' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Astros Take Down Orioles 11-5**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros secured a convincing 11-5 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Lance McCullers Jr. earning the win after pitching 6.0 innings with 9 strikeouts. Cam Smith led the Astros' offense with a home run, 3 RBIs, and 1 hit in 4 at-bats.

top_news.title: Cardinals Cruise Past Pirates 10-5
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 10-5 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Jordan Walker leading the offense. Walker hit 2 home runs, drove in 3 runs, and had 5 at-bats in the win.

top_news.title: **Cubs Come from Behind to Defeat Diamondbacks 6-5**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs secured a thrilling 6-5 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Colin Rea making a significant impact on the mound. Geraldo Perdomo and Ildemaro Vargas were among the notable hitters for the Diamondbacks, while Jorge Barrosa also contributed to the team's effort.

top_news.title: **Matt Brash Placed on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners right-handed pitcher Matt Brash has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right lat inflammation, effective retroactive to April 30, 2026.

top_news.title: **Tigers Acquire Zack Short in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers have added infielder Zack Short to their roster after acquiring him in a trade with the Washington Nationals for cash.
